title: Writing - Part 1: Volunteering
description: Your class has been discussing the benefits of volunteering and how to encourage more people to volunteer in their communities.

content.question: Write an essay discussing two of the benefits in your notes. You should explain which benefit you consider most significant, giving reasons for your opinion.

opinions: Volunteering builds confidence, empathy and new skills that are valuable throughout life.
Charities and local organisations depend on volunteers to deliver essential services.
Employers value volunteer experience and it can lead to new professional connections.

structure.introduction: Introduce the concept of volunteering and its growing importance in society.
structure.bodyParagraph1: Discuss the first benefit and explain its value.
structure.bodyParagraph2: Discuss the second benefit and argue which of the two is more significant.
structure.conclusion: Summarise your argument and encourage people to consider volunteering.

content.modelAnswer:
Volunteering is a powerful way to give back to society while gaining valuable personal experiences. Two of its most notable benefits are personal development and career opportunities.

On a personal level, volunteering helps individuals grow in many ways. By working with diverse groups of people and facing real challenges, volunteers develop empathy, communication skills and resilience. These qualities are not easily taught in a classroom, making voluntary work a uniquely enriching experience that stays with a person throughout their life.

From a professional perspective, volunteering can also open doors. Many employers view it as evidence of initiative, commitment and social awareness. Furthermore, volunteers often build networks that lead to internships or job offers. In competitive job markets, relevant volunteer experience can make a candidate stand out significantly.

In conclusion, while both benefits are valuable, I believe career opportunities are particularly important for young people starting out. Volunteering not only enriches one's character but can also be a stepping stone to a fulfilling professional future.
